summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend UI verified for service charge removal from per-order, discount banners on customer page, discount details in orders, timed service buttons (Verildi/Yetərlidir), and table transfer functionality.

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility (console warning) - minor, inherited from previous iterations

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed syntax error in ActiveTablesPage.js line 598 (extra closing brace)
POST /api/orders correctly sets service_charge_amount=0 (no per-order service charge)
POST /api/sessions/close/{id} correctly calculates service_charge on total (10% = 8.91 AZN on 89.1 AZN)
GET /api/discounts/active returns active discount campaigns for customer view
Customer page shows active discount campaign banners at top of menu
Customer 'Sifarişlərim' shows discount per order (discount_name, discount_amount)
Customer page does NOT show service charge per order (correct)
Admin session detail does NOT show per-order service charge (correct)
Bill summary modal shows service charge as total only (total_service_charge)
Session detail shows 'Masa Dəyişdir' button for transfer
Timed service has both 'Verildi' and 'Yetərlidir' buttons
seed_data_creation: Created test orders and timed services during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 features fully tested. Key changes: 1) Service charge removed from per-order calculation - now only applied when admin closes table (total_service_charge in bill_summary). 2) Customer sees active discount campaign banners via GET /api/discounts/active. 3) Customer 'Sifarişlərim' shows discount_name and discount_amount per order. 4) Timed service 'Verildi' creates order with service_charge_amount=0. 5) Timed service 'Yetərlidir' stops service (is_active=false). 6) Table transfer via POST /api/sessions/transfer works correctly.

features_tested.close_session_service_charge: PASS - POST /api/sessions/close calculates total_service_charge on total
features_tested.session_transfer: PASS - POST /api/sessions/transfer moves session to new table
features_tested.timed_service_serve_no_charge: PASS - PUT /api/timed-services/{id}/serve creates order with service_charge_amount=0
features_tested.customer_discount_banners: PASS - Active discount banners displayed on customer page
features_tested.customer_orders_discount: PASS - Discount name and amount shown in 'Sifarişlərim'
features_tested.customer_no_per_order_service_charge: PASS - No service charge displayed per order
features_tested.admin_no_per_order_service_charge: PASS - No service charge displayed per order in session details
features_tested.bill_summary_service_charge: PASS - Service charge shown as total in bill summary
features_tested.transfer_button: PASS - 'Masa Dəyişdir' button present in session details
features_tested.verildi_button: PASS - 'Verildi' button present for timed services
features_tested.yeterlidir_button: PASS - 'Yetərlidir' button present for timed services

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/sessions/transfer - PASS (moves session to new table)
PUT /api/timed-services/{id}/serve - PASS (creates order without service charge)

customer_page.discount_banners: PASS - '50 AZN+ Endirim - 15% endirim (min. 50 AZN)' displayed
customer_page.orders_panel_discount: PASS - Shows discount name and amount per order
customer_page.no_per_order_service_charge: PASS - Service charge not shown per order

admin_session_details.summary_cards: PASS - Shows Məkan, Sifariş, Endirim, Cəmi
admin_session_details.no_per_order_service_charge: PASS - Service charge not shown per order
